description_long: This is a tall, narrow ladder with a rectangular frame and evenly spaced horizontal rungs running between two vertical side rails. The structure appears to be made primarily of metal, likely steel or aluminum, with a uniform, industrial finish. The rungs are flat and extend the full width between the rails, providing stable footing for climbing. The side rails have a boxy, rectangular profile, giving the ladder a sturdy and robust appearance. There are no visible safety features such as anti-slip feet or handrails, and the design suggests it is intended for fixed installation, possibly in an urban or industrial setting. The overall color is a muted metallic with some dark accents, and the construction is open, allowing visibility through the rungs.
description: A tall, narrow metal ladder with rectangular side rails and evenly spaced flat rungs, designed for fixed installation in urban or industrial environments.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full height, all rungs, and the open rectangular frame.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the thin profile of the ladder and the depth of the side rails.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, showing the rungs and open frame from the opposite side.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again highlighting the slim profile and solid side rails.
